name: WordOrb Vocabulary

releases.author: nicoletterankin
releases.description:
## WordOrb Vocabulary for Obsidian v1.0.0

Look up words, generate vocabulary notes, insert word cards, and take quizzes — all from within Obsidian.

### Features
- **Word Lookup**: Search 162,000+ words with IPA pronunciation, etymology, and translations in 47 languages
- **Vocabulary Notes**: Auto-generate rich vocabulary notes with definition, etymology, translations, lesson content, and quiz questions
- **Word Cards**: Insert formatted word cards directly into your notes
- **Daily Lessons**: View the daily lesson (365 days of structured 5-phase content)
- **Quizzes**: Take interactive vocabulary quizzes with instant feedback
- **Daily Note Integration**: Automatically append word-of-the-day to daily notes
- **Inline Links**: Use `[[wordorb:word]]` syntax for clickable word lookups

### Setup
1. Install the plugin
2. Go to Settings → WordOrb Vocabulary
3. Enter your API key (get one free at [wordorb.ai](https://wordorb.ai))
4. Start looking up words!
releases.name: WordOrb Vocabulary v1.0.0
